samples.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
steps: Cook macaroni according to package directions
Drain the butter. Add flour and stir over smooth heat
Add to macaroni mixture. > Mix well
Place in buttered dish and sprinkle with bread crumbs
samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

- butter
- flour
- milk

- salt

samples.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
steps: Melt butter in a large saucepan
Add flour , lowfat milk, salt and pepper
Add cheese and cheese, process until melted
samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- elbow macaroni
- butter
- flour
- milk
- sharp cheddar cheese
- salt
- black pepper
- bread crumbs

Instructions:
1. Preheat macaroni to 350F
2. Melt butter in a large saucepan
3. Add flour , lowfat milk, salt and pepper
4. Cook till thickened and bubbly
5. Add cheese and cheese, process until melted
6. Stir in macaroni
7. Pour into greased casserole dish
8. Cover with buttered bread crumbs
9. Bake at 350F for 30 minutes

samples.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
steps: Cook the macaroni according to the
the butter, flour, cheese, salt and pepper
Add the macaroni to the cheese mixture
Place in a 2 quart casserole dish
Bake at 350 for 30 minutes or until macaroni is tender
samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- elbow macaroni
- butter
- flour
- milk
- sharp cheddar cheese
- salt
- black pepper
- bread crumbs

Instructions:
1. Cook the macaroni according to the
2. the butter, flour, cheese, salt and pepper
3. Cook until thick
4. Add the macaroni to the cheese mixture
5. Place in a 2 quart casserole dish
6. Top with bread crumbs
7. Sprinkle with paprika
8. Bake at 350 for 30 minutes or until macaroni is tender
